text.message: Lol and there I was hoping for a chill game
thought you wanted a chill game lol
No idea why he pointed there tbh, brick port doesn't help him at all
you need it more than me
guys holy moly. i don't think im even ahead
i can trade if you sling me next brick
I can give you a nb and a future brick for the 2:2
i can do the same with you black
Heh bro negotiated his full settle
yea but red is trading me a brick
Yeah it would be ankward if he steals it
yea it would be weird if i rob the brick
i think you are doing just fine with army
dang it thats my brick from black!
yeah lol still don't have one
Yeah the block is killing us lol
wanna trade this and i unblock your 8?
need an 8 so i can get the brick!
What do you want? I owe you a nb
i can do with this trade
i just want a brick trade
Oh, gotta use that one now
you trade and i 3:1 the brick for you?
you want insurance? i can do for nb
do u still want that brick gold? lol
oh ok, we need 8 roll then
extorting someone in my position is laughable
dang it black i would just trade you
i can challenge them if my numbers ever roll tho
And also I dont have an easy endgame as we fight road
the thing is, nobody is right road lol
we need to test red dev i think.......
Yellow does have an amazing port for his endgame
you could go to 8pts with blink of an eye....
Yeah but we need 10 to win and you get those easier ^^
and we never know what dev you holding if you not blocked
thought the 6 wheat was a fair block but anyway
I will pay the nb I guess
you are so far ahead anyway, not sure how we stop you now lol
maybe we need to give you cards to fight road
you can keep the brick you owe me i guess
i have a brick if you need
can't wait to see the dice stats
think the problem is we needed to switch attention to red
but that few turns they weren't being blocked
i thought your position was stronger once my red numbers started rolling
It kinda was a dice roll
i dont even know wtf is this block
If the yellows rolled more, yellow would be quite ahead
idk how i am quite ahead when i am not getting army or road
Yeah, when black blocked you I meant
Yellows didnt roll and blavk got army
i have a brick if you need for road black
He has a quite secure road tbh, I'll just build
I mean unless 8 rolls like 3 times
blue can also take road with a RB, idk about "road is secured"
i was just offering help for black to secure road
